tabs.label: Home
tabs.title: Support the school, strengthen the alumni network, and help shape North America Connect 2026.
tabs.copy: This site brings together the most important ways to stay involved: give from the United States, support or attend North America Connect 2026, and reach the team directly.

tabs.label: Causes
tabs.title: Choose the causes JAANA can support for St. Joseph's Boys' High School.
tabs.copy: Review the priority funds currently open for support, compare their purpose and impact, and decide where you want your contribution to go.

tabs.label: Donate
tabs.title: Donate to St. Joseph's Boys' High School through JAANA in North America.
tabs.copy: Online giving through JAANA will be available soon. Donation links for the supported causes will be published here once they are ready.

tabs.label: North America Connect 2026
tabs.title: North America Connect 2026 is the next major alumni gathering across North America.
tabs.copy: Save the date for the September 2026 reunion weekend, review sponsor information, and browse event albums from across the OBA community.

priorityCards.title: Causes
priorityCards.body: Review the school causes currently open for support, compare their scope, and choose the impact area that matters most to you.

priorityCards.title: Donate
priorityCards.body: The Donate page will soon include online giving links for the supported causes, along with current contact details for donors.

priorityCards.title: North America Connect 2026
priorityCards.body: North America Connect 2026 is the next major gathering point for alumni and families across North America, with sponsorship opportunities already open.
points: Saturday Dinner and Sunday Picnic Lunch
Call to Sponsors document and contacts

causeCards.title: Student Scholarships
causeCards.summary: Help students remain at SJBHS and continue their education without financial interruption.
causeCards.purpose: Make sure students who need financial aid can continue at SJBHS with dignity, stability, and continuity.
causeCards.impact: Impact: 114 students were supported in Academic Year 2024-25.
support: Loyola Scholarship Scheme: annual commitment of INR 75,000 (approx. USD 900) per scholar for 10 years.
General grants from INR 500 (approx. USD 6) and multiples thereof.
Endowment fund minimum of INR 5,00,000 (approx. USD 6,000) for recurring annual support.
donationWays: Make a one-time grant to support students immediately.
Create longer-term recurring impact through an endowment commitment.
Smaller gifts can still be directed to scholarships through the standard donation route.

causeCards.title: Teachers Insurance Program
causeCards.summary: Protect teaching staff, support staff, retired staff, and eligible families through insurance coverage.
causeCards.purpose: Provide health and personal accident coverage for teaching staff, support staff, retired staff, and eligible family members.
causeCards.impact: Impact: health insurance coverage of INR 3,00,000 for 540 lives, plus personal accident coverage for 180 teaching staff.
support: General grants from INR 500 (approx. USD 6) and multiples thereof.
Endowment fund minimum of INR 5,00,000 (approx. USD 6,000) for recurring annual support.
donationWays: Fund the current insurance cycle through a one-time grant.
Build recurring support through an endowment contribution.
Smaller gifts can still be routed toward teacher welfare through the standard donation process.

causeCards.title: Mid-Day Meal Program
causeCards.summary: Help provide a nourishing meal to children each school day.
causeCards.purpose: Support a dependable mid-day meal programme that helps children learn and grow well.
causeCards.impact: Impact: 3,000 meals were supported in Academic Year 2024-25.
support: General grants from INR 500 (approx. USD 6) and multiples thereof.
Endowment fund minimum of INR 5,00,000 (approx. USD 6,000) for recurring annual support.
donationWays: Make a one-time grant to fund meals now.
Use an endowment route to create recurring annual support.
Smaller gifts can still be applied to the programme through the standard donation route.

causeCards.title: Student Awards Program
causeCards.summary: Back prizes and recognition that celebrate excellence in academics, sport, and the arts.
causeCards.purpose: Strengthen aspiration, confidence, and recognition across school life through well-timed annual awards.
causeCards.goal: Goal: build an awards system that strengthens recognition, morale, and aspiration.
causeCards.impact: Impact: awards at key stages of school life reinforce confidence, achievement, and continuity across the student journey.
support: Endowment fund minimum of INR 1,00,000 (approx. USD 1,200), with proceeds awarded annually.
Useful for donors who want named recognition attached to a recurring annual prize.
donationWays: Endowment support is the primary route for recurring annual awards.
Named donor-backed prizes work especially well here.
This cause suits donors who want visible, long-term recognition tied to student excellence.

causeCards.title: School Infrastructure Development
causeCards.summary: Support classrooms, laboratories, sports facilities, and other campus development needs.
causeCards.purpose: Help improve the physical spaces where students learn, compete, and build community.
causeCards.impact: Impact: legacy-led contributions can fund named learning spaces and long-term improvements across the school campus.
support: Name on a pillar or pavilion plaque: INR 5,00,000 (approx. USD 6,000).
General grants from INR 500 (approx. USD 6) and multiples thereof.
donationWays: Make a one-time grant for immediate capital support.
Use named giving opportunities for classrooms, pillars, and pavilions.
General contributions can still be directed toward broader infrastructure needs.

causeCards.title: Other Jesuit causes
causeCards.summary: Direct support to allied BJES and Josephite causes beyond the core OBA priorities.
causeCards.purpose: Support allied BJES and Josephite causes when donors want to direct their giving beyond the core OBA school-support priorities.
causeCards.goal: Goal: donor-directed support routed through the same compliant USA donation process.
causeCards.impact: Impact: allied causes can be acknowledged in OBA communications and the annual report with credit to donors.
support: Use the donation agreement to specify the intended end use clearly.
Suitable for individual, family, or batch-led contributions supporting allied Jesuit work.
The same endowment, grant, and donation routes apply.
donationWays: Use the donation agreement to state the exact Jesuit or BJES cause you want supported.
One-time grants work well for directed needs requiring current deployment.
Endowment and general donation routes can still be used when a recurring or pooled structure is more appropriate.

sponsorHighlights.title: Save the date
sponsorHighlights.body: North America Connect is planned for September 19 and 20, 2026 in the Washington, D.C. metro area, with a Saturday Dinner and Sunday Picnic Lunch.

sponsorHighlights.title: Audience and reach
sponsorHighlights.body: The sponsor packet projects 100+ in-person attendees across alumni and families, plus 300+ additional members reached through JAANA social channels.

sponsorHighlights.title: Charitable impact
sponsorHighlights.body: Event proceeds are intended to support the SJBHS OBA Teachers Insurance fund covering teaching staff, support staff, retired staff, and eligible families.

sponsorHighlights.title: Why sponsors fit here
sponsorHighlights.body: Sponsors are speaking to a high-trust alumni audience that values relationships, referrals, and services across real estate, finance, tax, wealth planning, senior care, insurance, banking, and legal work.

sponsorTiers.title: Bronze
benefits: Text listing in the brochure and digital brochure.
Rolling presentation listing at the venue.
Tagged in thank-you and recap communications.

sponsorTiers.title: Silver
benefits: Half-page ad in the brochure and digital brochure.
Logo in the rolling presentation plus banner placement.
Individual social post and 1 included ticket.

sponsorTiers.title: Gold
benefits: Full-page brochure ad, QR option, and hyperlinks in the digital brochure.
Feature-story or video treatment on social media.
Individual table or sponsor-zone visibility, podium recognition, and 2 included tickets.

connectPage.sponsorMessage: We are seeking sponsors for our North America Connect reunion, your brand/business will have the opportunity to reach hundreds of successful Josephites and their families. Proceeds from the event will fund the OBA Teachers Insurance program. Individual and batch benefactors are also warmly welcome.

homeCopy.heroLead: JAANA supports St. Joseph's Boys' High School through alumni-led service, giving, and community events across North America.
homeCopy.aboutBody: The Josephite Alumni Association of North America brings together SJBHS alumni and families to support scholarships, teacher welfare, student programmes, and school development through trusted giving and active fellowship.
homeCopy.causesCardBody: Review the active school causes and decide where you want your support to go.
homeCopy.donateCardBody: Find current donation guidance and contact points while online giving links are being finalized.
homeCopy.connectCardBody: Check sponsor details and reunion updates for the September 2026 weekend.
homeCopy.eventsTitle: Upcoming JAANA events | Past JAANA events
homeCopy.upcomingEventsBody: North America Connect 2026 | September 19-20, 2026 | Washington DC & Northern Virginia.
homeCopy.pastEventsBody: Browse past OBA and Connect event albums in a dialog view.
